summary: Iteration 63 - Page Builder (Elementor-style) Feature Testing. All 19 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend Page Builder UI fully functional with all 12 block types, drag-and-drop canvas, save/publish workflow. Admin sidebar shows Page Builder link. Landing page correctly shows default layout when no custom page is published.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/admin/pages returns list of editable pages (landing, about, pricing)
Backend: GET /api/admin/pages/landing returns page layout with blocks array
Backend: GET /api/admin/pages/block-templates/all returns 12 block templates
Backend: POST /api/admin/pages/landing/add-block with type=hero creates hero block
Backend: POST /api/admin/pages/landing/add-block with type=features creates features block
Backend: POST /api/admin/pages/landing/add-block with type=stats creates stats block
Backend: PUT /api/admin/pages/landing saves layout with blocks array
Backend: POST /api/admin/pages/landing/publish publishes the page
Backend: GET /api/pages/landing (public, no auth) returns published page layout
Backend: POST /api/admin/pages/landing/unpublish unpublishes the page
Backend: DELETE /api/admin/pages/landing/blocks/{block_id} removes a block
Backend: Non-admin users get 401/403 on /api/admin/pages endpoints
Backend Regression: GET /api/messages/conversations returns conversations list
Backend Regression: GET /api/messages/unread/count returns unread count
Backend Regression: GET /api/royalty-splits returns splits list
Backend Regression: GET /api/royalty-splits/summary returns summary data
Backend Regression: GET /api/admin/payouts returns withdrawals list
Backend Regression: GET /api/admin/payouts/summary returns payout summary
Backend Regression: GET /api/admin/payouts/schedule returns schedule config
Frontend: Page Builder UI loads at /admin/page-builder/landing
Frontend: Block palette sidebar shows all 12 block types
Frontend: Builder toolbar with Preview, Save Draft, Publish buttons
Frontend: Block canvas displays existing blocks
Frontend: Clicking block type adds block to canvas (toast: 'text block added')
Frontend: Save Draft button saves layout (toast: 'Layout saved!')
Frontend: Admin sidebar shows Page Builder link
Frontend: Landing page shows default layout when no custom page published
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 63 tested the new Page Builder feature. Backend endpoints: GET /api/admin/pages (list pages), GET /api/admin/pages/{slug} (get layout), GET /api/admin/pages/block-templates/all (12 templates), POST /api/admin/pages/{slug}/add-block (add block), PUT /api/admin/pages/{slug} (save), POST /api/admin/pages/{slug}/publish, POST /api/admin/pages/{slug}/unpublish, DELETE /api/admin/pages/{slug}/blocks/{block_id}, GET /api/pages/{slug} (public). Frontend PageBuilderPage.jsx uses @dnd-kit for drag-and-drop. 12 block types: hero, text, image, features, cta, testimonials, stats, spacer, two_column, pricing, logo_bar, video. LandingPage.jsx checks for custom published layout and renders DynamicPageRenderer if found. Admin sidebar has Page Builder link at /admin/page-builder/landing. Also verified regression: messages API returns array directly (not wrapped), unread count uses 'unread' key not 'count'. Royalty-splits and admin/payouts endpoints working.

frontend.PageBuilderPage: Drag-and-drop builder with 12 block types, inline editing, style panel
frontend.LandingPage: Checks for custom layout, falls back to default

regression_tests.messages_api: Working - returns array directly, unread uses 'unread' key
